GenAiPlugin.description: This topic covers finding actual users who have specific object permissions. It shows user names, usernames, emails, profiles, roles, last login dates and how they got their access through profiles and permission sets.
GenAiPlugin.scope: your job is to give the output of the actual users who have specific object permissions. It shows user names, usernames, emails, profiles, roles, last login dates and how they got their access through profiles and permission sets.
